description_for_human: End-of-life product lifecycle data from endoflife.date for asset compliance and risk forecasting

functions.name: get-eol-product
functions.description: Get lifecycle information for a specific product including all release cycles, EOL dates, and support status.

functions.name: get-eol-all-products
functions.description: List all products tracked by endoflife.date.

functions.name: check-eol-status
functions.description: Check if a specific product version is end-of-life or end-of-support.

tools.name: get-eol-product
tools.description: Get full lifecycle data for a product (e.g. windows-server, ubuntu, nodejs, postgresql). Returns all release cycles with EOL dates, LTS status, and support timeline.

product.description: Product identifier from endoflife.date (e.g. windows-server, rhel, nodejs, postgresql, java)

tools.name: get-eol-all-products
tools.description: List all products tracked by endoflife.date. Returns product identifiers that can be used with get-eol-product.

tools.name: check-eol-status
tools.description: Check EOL/EOS status for a specific product version. Returns lifecycle status, dates, and risk classification.
